title: The Keys Become the Objective
description: Back in Enies Lobby, the Straw Hats fully reject the World Government’s authority and stand with Robin.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Spandam, Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji. Back in Enies Lobby, the Straw Hats fully reject the World Government’s authority and stand with Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm on the wanted list, too...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Where's Nico Robin!!? Hand her over!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sogeking
dialogue.text: Damn it!!! It's because she's onboard....!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Your mere existence is a sin!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Nico Robin is in this town!!?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: I've got nothing to sell you!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: I want you to help us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I heard that you can read...

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Ask for the buster call now...

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: and ruined the lives of many people!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: No matter what sea I go to,

summary: Back in Enies Lobby, the Straw Hats fully reject the World Government’s authority and stand with Robin.
